UI_trait_underweightDesc2:
Low combat effectiveness, low endurance and prone to injury.
Starts with 70 weight and Fast Metabolism trait.
UI_trait_veryunderweightDesc2:
Very low combat effectiveness, very low endurance and prone to injury.
Starts with 60 weight and Fast Metabolism trait.
UI_trait_overweightDesc2:
Low running speed, low endurance and prone to injury.
Starts with 95 weight and Slow Metabolism trait.
UI_trait_obeseDesc2:
Very low running speed, very low endurance and prone to injury.
Starts with 105 weight and Slow Metabolism trait.
UI_trait_MechanicsDesc: Knows how to service and repair standard and heavy vehicles.
UI_trait_Mechanics2Desc: Knows how to service and repair all types of vehicles.
UI_trait_Cook2Desc: Has skills in Cooking and Butchering.
UI_trait_Hunter2Desc: Has skills in Aiming, Short Blade, Sneaking, Trapping and Tracking.
UI_trait_Scout2Desc: Has skills in First Aid, Fishing and Foraging.
UI_trait_Gymnast2Desc: Has skills in Nimble and Lightfooted.
UI_trait_HikerDesc2:
Experienced in hiking long distances.
Knows some trapping recipes.
(Slightly reduces accumulation of hunger, thirst and fatigue if walking for a while without stopping.)
UI_trait_BarFighterDesc2:
Used to getting in trouble.
Successful attacks in melee have a chance to reduce unhappiness.
Knows some improvised weapons recipes.
UI_trait_DexterousDesc2:
Transfers inventory items 50% faster. Draws weapons faster.
Climbs ropes faster, with a reduced chance of falling.
UI_trait_AllThumbsDesc2:
Transfers inventory items 50% slower. Draws weapons slower.
Climbs ropes slower, with an increased chance of falling.
Cannot craft items while walking.
UI_trait_SmokerDesc2:
Has a tobacco addiction.
Smoking tobacco reduces stress, unhappiness, and hunger.
Abstaining from smoking increases stress, unhappiness, and hunger.
May cough, attracting unwanted attention.
Slightly increases endurance loss while running or fighting.
UI_trait_pronetoillnessDesc2:
More prone to disease. May accidentally catch a cold.
Faster rate of zombification.
(+25% zombification speed, +70% chance of catching a cold,
+20% cold strength, +50% cold progression speed,
has a negligible chance of catching a cold while outside.)
UI_trait_HemophobicDesc2:
Panic when performing first aid on self.
Cannot perform first aid on others.
Gets stressed and unhappy when covered in blood.
UI_trait_PacifistDesc2:
Decreases combat XP gains.
(-25% XP for all weapon skills, Maintenance skill and Aiming skill.)
UI_trait_shooter2desc: Has skills in Aiming and Reloading.
UI_trait_tirelessdesc:
Has a small chance to partially recover endurance after a successful weapon attack.
Muscle strain recovers faster.
UI_trait_marathonrunnerdesc:
Increases endurance recovery while running.
(Does not affect running while sneaking.)
UI_trait_breathingtechniquedesc:
Increases endurance recovery while not moving.
(More effective while sitting.)
UI_trait_fastmetabolismdesc:
Prone to lose weight.
Trains Fitness faster, but Strength slower.
(+30% calorie burn if weight is more than 70,
+30% Fitness XP, -30% Strength XP.)
UI_trait_slowmetabolismdesc:
Prone to gain weight.
Trains Strength faster, but Fitness slower.
(-30% calorie burn if weight is less than 90,
+30% Strength XP, -30% Fitness XP.)
UI_trait_mushroompickerdesc: Increases chance to find mushrooms in Search mode.
UI_trait_entomologistdesc: Increases chance to find insects in Search mode.
UI_trait_generatorexpertdesc:
Knows how to operate and repair generators.
(Repairing a generator increases its condition by an additional 5%.)
UI_trait_crueltydesc:
Increases combat XP gains.
(+25% XP for all weapon skills, Maintenance skill and Aiming skill.)
UI_trait_fearofthedarkdesc:
Fear of the dark. Panic without light sources.
Being in the dark for a long time also increases stress.
UI_trait_sensitivedigestiondesc:
Experiences stomach discomfort, pain, and nausea when overeating.
(The higher the fullness, the stronger the discomfort, pain, and nausea.)
UI_trait_allergicdesc:
Sneezes involuntarily, attracting unwanted attention.
(Sneezes can be muffled with a tissue, handkerchief, or toilet paper.)
UI_trait_snorerdesc: Snores loudly during sleep, attracting unwanted attention.
UI_trait_panicattacksdesc:
Suffers from sudden panic attacks.
Panic passes slower.
(May wake up from a panic attack.
Panic attacks become less frequent with survived time.)
UI_trait_alcoholicdesc:
Has an alcohol addiction.
Abstaining from alcohol increases boredom, unhappiness, and thirst.
Prolonged abstinence increases fatigue, stress, headache, and nausea.
Alcohol's effect on drowsiness is reduced.
UI_trait_formeralcoholicdesc:
Has a chance of relapsing and becoming an Alcoholic again when drinking alcohol.
The chance of relapsing becomes lower with each passing day.
UI_trait_formersmokerdesc:
Has a chance of relapsing and becoming a Smoker again when using tobacco products.
The chance of relapsing becomes lower with each passing day.
UI_trait_strongbackdesc:
Increases carry weight.
(Plus 1-2 carry weight depending on Strength level.)
UI_trait_weakbackdesc:
Reduces carry weight.
(Minus 1-3 carry weight depending on Strength level.)
UI_trait_thickblooddesc:
Wounds bleeds less.
(-50% damage from bleeding.)
UI_trait_liquidblooddesc:
Wounds bleeds more.
(+100% damage from bleeding.)
UI_trait_owlpersondesc:
Prefers to stay awake in the evenings.
(Fatigue gains more slowly in the evening (05:00 p.m. - 10:00 p.m.),
but faster in the morning (05:00 a.m. - 10:00 a.m.)).
UI_trait_larkpersondesc:
Prefers to be awake in the morning.
(Fatigue gains more slowly in the morning (05:00 a.m. - 10:00 a.m.),
but faster in the evening (05:00 p.m. - 10:00 p.m.)).
UI_trait_optimisticdesc:
Less bored. May not be depressed for a long time.
(-50% passive boredom generation.
Maximum Unhappiness level cannot exceed 50% for 48 hours.)
UI_trait_depressivedesc:
Often sad. May become depressed for no reason.
Bad mood can affect productivity.
(Unhappiness builds up over time.
Sudden depression may occur once every few days.
Reduces XP gain in all skills depending on
Unhappiness moodle, up to -10%.)
UI_trait_calmmindeddesc:
Remains calm in stressful situations.
(Maximum stress cannot exceed 50%,
Stress and panic decrease faster.)
UI_trait_lesssweatydesc:
Reduces wetness generated.
(May be less effective while under rain.)
UI_trait_highsweatydesc:
Increases wetness generated.
(Sweating increases during combat, running or doing fitness.)
UI_trait_improvedforagingdesc: Increases the chances of finding specific items in Search Mode depending on your occupation.
UI_trait_advancedforagingdesc: Significantly increases the chances of finding specific items in Search Mode depending on your occupation.
UI_trait_commercialdriverdesc:
Reduces fatigue gain when driving a moving vehicle.
Able to repair heavy vehicles.
UI_trait_usedtocorpsesdesc:
Decaying corpses do not cause nausea.
(If do not have nausea at the moment. Does not affect zombification sickness.)
UI_trait_refuellerdesc:
Transfers inventory items, refuels vehicles and drains gasoline faster.
(-25% inventory transferring time, refueling vehicles and draining gasoline.
Up to -60% inventory transferring time with
UI_trait_cuttingtoolsdesc: Gains +20% XP when using Axes, Short Blades, or Long Blades with the main hand.
UI_trait_lifelonglearnerdesc: Does not get bored while reading educational literature.
UI_trait_breakintechniquedesc: Axes deals more damage to doors and barricades.
UI_trait_stronggripdesc:
Heavy weapons consume less endurance when swinging.
(affects weapons with heavy attacks, changing their increased stamina consumption to the base)
UI_profdesc_parkranger:
Allows much faster movement through forests and woodland.
Knows some trapping recipes.
UI_profdesc_lumberjack: Allows slightly faster movement through forests and woodland.
UI_profdesc_engineer: Knows some bombs and noise generators recipes.
